feat.name: Guiding Shot
feat.requirement: You are wielding a ranged weapon.
feat.text: Your ranged attack helps guide your allies into striking your enemy's weak point. Attempt a Strike with the required weapon. If the Strike hits, the next creature other than you to attack the same target before the start of your next turn gains a +1 circumstance bonus to their roll, or a +2 circumstance bonus if your Strike was a critical hit.

traits.name: Commander
traits.text: This trait indicates abilities from the commander class.

traits.name: Flourish
traits.text: Actions with the flourish trait are special techniques that require too much exertion for you to perform frequently. You can use only one action with the flourish trait per round.
